evals.prompt: Build a premium fast-casual single-file SPA for POTATO & CO. containing 9 fully responsive views using strict Neobrutalism UI design tokens, including an ultra-bold headline hero, integrated custom order modifiers for Potatoes/Frites/Chips, and an interactive itemized shopping cart state switch logic without placeholders.
evals.expected_output: A single standalone HTML file containing no code placeholders, featuring exact 4px solid dark contours, geometric unblurred hard shadows, interactive hover animation states, and a dynamic Vanilla JS tab switcher for all 9 core views.
